3221630.name: Omnivores Rule
3221630.description:
🪐 Planet untamed. Future uncertain.

Awaken as a scout for alien life. Your mission is simple: collect information for your human creators before they arrive. But this world does not bow to human hands. And maybe, neither should you. Who are you? A pawn? A protector? A predator? Or something else entirely?

🕊️ Take Flight. Find Your Truth.

  • Non-linear – Learn the secret rhythms of the wild on your own terms.

  • Find your place within the cycle or disrupt it entirely.

  • Drift between towering canopies, boom through caverns, and track the echoes of a long-abandoned human terraforming attempt.

🌍 Discover the beauty and brutality of a living ecosystem.

  • Flora, fauna, and environment interact in surprising and systemic ways.

  • Every action ripples through the world. Nature will remember.

  • Lush valleys flood with seasonal blooms, predators stalk under the cover of darkness, and storms force you to rethink your movement.

🔊 Speak the Language of the Wild

  • Your voice is your power—create, destroy, and understand.

📡 Echolocate – Reveal the hidden. Map the unknown.

🗣 Shout – Send shockwaves through the land itself.

💬 Whisper – Form bonds that last a lifetime… or shatter in an instant.
3221630.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
